quantification.why: Nearly every comparison carries a computed figure — Gadget is "12.9% ahead of Widget," North's mean order is "$272.04 versus $202.12 in West, a 34.6% difference," and West "trails North by 35.0%."

specificity.why: Each recommendation names a product with data-grounded figures — "Grow Gadget sales: 16 units produced $2,392.00... highest revenue per unit ($149.50)," "Investigate West," and "Review Sprocket pricing... $4.75 each."

insight_density.why: It surfaces multiple actionable, non-obvious observations, e.g. Sprocket "sold the most units by far — 238... yet returned the least revenue" and the regional gap arising from order size rather than order count.
